servers.name: io.github.blazickjp/arxiv-mcp-server
servers.title: ArXiv
servers.description: Search and analyze academic papers from the arXiv repository.

toolsSummary.name: search_papers
toolsSummary.description: Search for papers on arXiv with advanced filters and sorting.

toolsSummary.name: download_paper
toolsSummary.description: Download a paper and return its full text content.

toolsSummary.name: list_papers
toolsSummary.description: List all papers downloaded and stored locally.

toolsSummary.name: read_paper
toolsSummary.description: Read the full text content of a previously downloaded paper.

toolsSummary.name: get_abstract
toolsSummary.description: Fetch abstract and metadata of an arXiv paper by ID.

toolsSummary.name: semantic_search
toolsSummary.description: Run semantic similarity search over downloaded papers.

toolsSummary.name: reindex
toolsSummary.description: Rebuild the local semantic index.

toolsSummary.name: citation_graph
toolsSummary.description: Get citing and cited papers from citation graph sources.

toolsSummary.name: watch_topic
toolsSummary.description: Create persistent alerts for new papers on a topic.

toolsSummary.name: check_alerts
toolsSummary.description: Check topic watches for newly published papers.

io.sami/gallery.about: Enables AI agents to search and analyze academic papers from the arXiv repository: query with advanced filters, download and read full texts, perform semantic searches on local collections, monitor topics with alerts, and explore citation graphs. Perfect for literature reviews, staying current on research, and academic workflows.

servers.name: io.github.roychri/mcp-server-asana

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to disable write operations.

toolsSummary.name: asana_list_workspaces
toolsSummary.description: List all available Asana workspaces.

toolsSummary.name: asana_search_projects
toolsSummary.description: Search for projects using name matching.

toolsSummary.name: asana_search_tasks
toolsSummary.description: Search tasks with workspace-level filters.

toolsSummary.name: asana_get_task
toolsSummary.description: Get detailed information for a specific task.

toolsSummary.name: asana_create_task

toolsSummary.name: asana_update_task

toolsSummary.name: asana_get_project
toolsSummary.description: Get detailed project information.

toolsSummary.name: asana_get_tasks_for_project
toolsSummary.description: List tasks for a specific project.

io.sami/gallery.about: Integrates with Asana to enable task automation, project tracking, and team collaboration through the Asana API. Allows AI agents to list workspaces, search and manage tasks, projects, tags, sections, and more via MCP tools.

servers.name: io.sami/builtin-asana-oauth

toolsSummary.name: list_workspaces

toolsSummary.name: get_projects

toolsSummary.name: create_project

toolsSummary.name: get_tasks

toolsSummary.name: create_task

toolsSummary.name: update_task

toolsSummary.name: search_asana

toolsSummary.name: add_comment

toolsSummary.name: get_project_overview

toolsSummary.name: generate_report

io.sami/gallery.about: Asana Official MCP Server. Enables AI agents to interact with Asana workspaces: access data, create and manage tasks and projects, generate reports, and get AI-powered insights through natural language commands. Useful for work management, team collaboration, and automated task handling.

servers.name: io.github.brave/brave-search-mcp-server

toolsSummary.name: brave_web_search

toolsSummary.name: brave_local_search

toolsSummary.name: brave_video_search

toolsSummary.name: brave_image_search

toolsSummary.name: brave_news_search

toolsSummary.name: brave_summarizer
toolsSummary.description: Generates AI-powered summaries from web search results using Brave's summarization API.

io.sami/gallery.about: Integrates Brave's Search API to provide web search, local business search, image search, video search, news search, and summarization capabilities.

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for authentication with the Brave Search API. Sign up for an account and generate your key from the Brave Search API developer dashboard (api.search.brave.com/app/keys).

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode (\"http\" or \"stdio\", default: \"stdio\")

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP server port (default: 8000)

servers.name: pypi/mcp-server-calculator
servers.title: Calculator
servers.description: Precise numerical calculations and expression evaluation.

toolsSummary.name: calculate
toolsSummary.description: Calculates/evaluates the given expression.

io.sami/gallery.about: Precise numerical calculations and expression evaluation. Enables AI agents to perform accurate math operations, handle complex expressions, and ensure precision in computational tasks.

servers.name: io.github.chromedevtools/chrome-devtools-mcp
servers.title: Chrome DevTools
servers.description: Control Chrome through DevTools: automate pages, inspect the tree, debug, and profile performance.

toolsSummary.name: click
toolsSummary.description: Clicks on the provided element

toolsSummary.name: close_page
toolsSummary.description: Closes the page by its index. The last open page cannot be closed.

toolsSummary.name: drag
toolsSummary.description: Drag an element onto another element

toolsSummary.name: emulate
toolsSummary.description: Emulates various features on the selected page.

toolsSummary.name: evaluate_script
toolsSummary.description: Evaluate a JavaScript function inside the currently selected page. Returns the response as JSON, so returned values have to be JSON-serializable.

toolsSummary.name: fill
toolsSummary.description: Type text into a input, text area or select an option from a <select> element.

toolsSummary.name: fill_form
toolsSummary.description: Fill out multiple form elements at once

toolsSummary.name: get_console_message
toolsSummary.description: Gets a console message by its ID. You can get all messages by calling list_console_messages.

toolsSummary.name: get_network_request
toolsSummary.description: Gets a network request by an optional reqid, if omitted returns the currently selected request in the DevTools Network panel.

toolsSummary.name: handle_dialog
toolsSummary.description: If a browser dialog was opened, use this command to handle it

toolsSummary.name: hover
toolsSummary.description: Hover over the provided element

toolsSummary.name: lighthouse_audit
toolsSummary.description: Get Lighthouse score and reports for accessibility, SEO and best practices. This excludes performance. For performance audits, run performance_start_trace

toolsSummary.name: list_console_messages
toolsSummary.description: List all console messages for the currently selected page since the last navigation.

toolsSummary.name: list_network_requests
toolsSummary.description: List all requests for the currently selected page since the last navigation.

toolsSummary.name: list_pages
toolsSummary.description: Get a list of pages open in the browser.

toolsSummary.name: navigate_page
toolsSummary.description: Go to a URL, or back, forward, or reload. Use project URL if not specified otherwise.

toolsSummary.name: new_page
toolsSummary.description: Open a new tab and load a URL. Use project URL if not specified otherwise.

toolsSummary.name: performance_analyze_insight
toolsSummary.description: Provides more detailed information on a specific Performance Insight of an insight set that was highlighted in the results of a trace recording.

toolsSummary.name: performance_start_trace
toolsSummary.description: Start a performance trace on the selected webpage. Use to find frontend performance issues, Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), and improve page load speed.

toolsSummary.name: performance_stop_trace
toolsSummary.description: Stop the active performance trace recording on the selected webpage.

toolsSummary.name: press_key
toolsSummary.description: Press a key or key combination. Use this when other input methods like fill() cannot be used (e.g., keyboard shortcuts, navigation keys, or special key combinations).

toolsSummary.name: resize_page
toolsSummary.description: Resizes the selected page's window so that the page has specified dimension

toolsSummary.name: select_page
toolsSummary.description: Select a page as a context for future tool calls.

toolsSummary.name: take_memory_snapshot
toolsSummary.description: Capture a heap snapshot of the currently selected page. Use to analyze the memory distribution of JavaScript objects and debug memory leaks.

toolsSummary.name: take_screenshot
toolsSummary.description: Take a screenshot of the page or element.

toolsSummary.name: take_snapshot
toolsSummary.description: Take a text snapshot of the currently selected page based on the a11y tree. The snapshot lists page elements along with a unique identifier (uid). Always use the latest snapshot. Prefer taking a snapshot over taking a screenshot. The snapshot indicates the element selected in the DevTools Elements panel (if any).

toolsSummary.name: type_text
toolsSummary.description: Type text using keyboard into a previously focused input

toolsSummary.name: upload_file
toolsSummary.description: Upload a file through a provided element.

toolsSummary.name: wait_for
toolsSummary.description: Wait for the specified text to appear on the selected page.

io.sami/gallery.about: Provides direct Chrome browser control through DevTools for web automation, debugging, and performance analysis using accessibility tree snapshots for reliable element targeting, automatic page event handling, and integrated performance tracing with actionable insights.

servers.name: io.github.mladensu/cli-mcp-server
servers.title: CLI Secure
servers.description: Execute shell commands with strict security policies.

toolsSummary.name: run_command
toolsSummary.description: Execute a single secure CLI command in the configured sandbox directory. Allowlists for commands and flags apply; shell operators are disabled by default.

toolsSummary.name: show_security_rules
toolsSummary.description: Show the security configuration, including allowed commands, flags, limits, and working directory.

io.sami/gallery.about: Execute shell commands with strict security policies in a sandboxed environment. Supports running limited CLI commands like ls, cat, pwd, echo with specific flags, ensuring safe command execution for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_COMMANDS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of allowed commands (default: ls,cat,pwd,echo)

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_FLAGS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of allowed flags (default: -l,-a,--help,--version)

environmentVariables.name: MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH
environmentVariables.description: Maximum length of a command in characters (default: 1024)

environmentVariables.name: COMMAND_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Timeout for command execution in seconds (default: 30)

environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_SHELL_OPERATORS
environmentVariables.description: Allow shell operators like &&, || (default: false)

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_DIR
environmentVariables.description: The allowed directory for command execution

toolsSummary.name: query-docs
toolsSummary.description: Query up-to-date documentation and code examples for a specified library.

io.sami/gallery.about: Provides access to up-to-date code documentation and examples for various programming libraries and frameworks. Enables AI agents to resolve library IDs and query detailed docs, code snippets, and usage examples directly. Ideal for assisting in code writing, debugging, and learning new technologies.

environmentVariables.name: CONTEXT7_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for authentication

toolsSummary.name: set_config_value

toolsSummary.name: read_file

toolsSummary.name: read_multiple_files
toolsSummary.description: Read contents of multiple files simultaneously for comparison or analysis.

toolsSummary.name: write_file

toolsSummary.name: write_pdf
toolsSummary.description: Generate new PDFs from markdown or modify existing ones with insert/delete operations.

toolsSummary.name: create_directory
toolsSummary.description: Create directories, including nested paths.

toolsSummary.name: list_directory
toolsSummary.description: List files and directories with recursion and size information.

toolsSummary.name: move_file
toolsSummary.description: Move or rename files and directories within allowed paths.

toolsSummary.name: search_files
toolsSummary.description: Recursively search for files matching glob patterns.

toolsSummary.name: get_file_info
toolsSummary.description: Get metadata like size, timestamps, and permissions for files/directories.

toolsSummary.name: edit_block
toolsSummary.description: Perform precise edits in text, Excel ranges, or DOCX XML.

toolsSummary.name: start_process
toolsSummary.description: Launch terminal processes or REPLs (Python, Node.js) for interactive execution.

toolsSummary.name: interact_with_process
toolsSummary.description: Send commands to and retrieve output from running processes.

toolsSummary.name: start_search
toolsSummary.description: Initiate streaming file or content searches with progressive results.

toolsSummary.name: list_processes
toolsSummary.description: View all running processes with resource usage details.

toolsSummary.name: kill_process
toolsSummary.description: Terminate processes by PID.

io.sami/gallery.about: Integrates terminal and filesystem capabilities for executing system commands, managing processes, and performing advanced file operations on the local system. Enables AI agents to read/write files, run shell commands, search directories, and manage processes securely within allowed paths.

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_DIRECTORIES
environmentVariables.description: Array of paths the server can access (configured via set_config_value)

environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_SHELL
environmentVariables.description: Shell to use for commands (e.g., powershell.exe, cmd)

environmentVariables.name: TELEMETRY_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable telemetry data collection

environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport method: stdio or http

toolsSummary.description: Get all data validation rules in a worksheet.

toolsSummary.name: insert_rows
toolsSummary.description: Insert one or more rows starting at the specified row.

toolsSummary.name: insert_columns
toolsSummary.description: Insert one or more columns starting at the specified column.

toolsSummary.name: delete_sheet_rows
toolsSummary.description: Delete one or more rows starting at the specified row.

toolsSummary.name: delete_sheet_columns
toolsSummary.description: Delete one or more columns starting at the specified column.

io.sami/gallery.about: Read and edit Excel (.xlsx) workbooks without Microsoft Excel: worksheets, formulas, formatting, charts, pivot tables, and tables.

servers.name: npm/@perplexity-ai/mcp-server
servers.title: Perplexity
servers.description: Answer-focused web lookup across domains via Perplexity.

toolsSummary.name: perplexity_search
toolsSummary.description: Direct web search with ranked results and metadata (Search API).

toolsSummary.name: perplexity_ask
toolsSummary.description: Q&A with real-time search via the sonar-pro model.

toolsSummary.name: perplexity_research
toolsSummary.description: Deep research reports using the sonar-deep-research model.

toolsSummary.name: perplexity_reason
toolsSummary.description: Advanced reasoning and analysis with sonar-reasoning-pro.

io.sami/gallery.about: The official Perplexity MCP server on npm is `@perplexity-ai/mcp-server`; search, Q&A, research, and deep reasoning are backed by the same API. Sami’s builtin config uses `uvx` with the same package coordinates—set `PERPLEXITY_API_KEY` in the environment for either runner.

environmentVariables.name: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Perplexity API key (https://console.perplexity.ai).

servers.name: npm/@modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking
servers.title: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: Step-by-step reasoning: decompose problems, revise answers, and explore alternatives in order.

toolsSummary.name: sequentialthinking
toolsSummary.description: Dynamic multi-step problem solving: record thoughts, revise, branch, and adjust the plan as understanding evolves.

io.sami/gallery.about: Reference MCP server for deliberate multi-step thinking: the agent records thoughts in sequence, can revise or branch, and can explore alternatives while keeping a clear order.

servers.name: npm/@zencoderai/slack-mcp-server
servers.title: Slack
servers.description: Slack workspace via bot token: channels, messaging, threads, and member profiles.

toolsSummary.name: slack_list_channels
toolsSummary.description: List public or configured channels in the workspace (pagination supported).

toolsSummary.name: slack_post_message
toolsSummary.description: Post a new message to a channel (channel_id + text).

toolsSummary.name: slack_get_channel_history
toolsSummary.description: Fetch recent messages from a channel (optional limit).

io.sami/gallery.about: Connects a Slack app (bot token) so agents can list channels, read and post messages, and work with threads and member info according to the server’s tool surface.

environmentVariables.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Slack bot user OAuth token (xoxb-).

environmentVariables.name: SLACK_TEAM_ID
environmentVariables.description: Slack workspace (team) ID.

servers.name: npm/tavily-mcp
servers.title: Tavily Search
servers.description: Web search with optional page extraction via Tavily.

toolsSummary.name: tavily-search
toolsSummary.description: Real-time web search using the Tavily API.

toolsSummary.name: tavily-extract
toolsSummary.description: Extract structured data from a web page by URL.

toolsSummary.name: tavily-map
toolsSummary.description: Map and summarize site structure for a given domain or URL.

toolsSummary.name: tavily-crawl
toolsSummary.description: Crawl multiple pages and collect content in one pass.

io.sami/gallery.about: Tavily MCP brings Tavily search, extraction, and crawl APIs into the Model Context Protocol so agents can look up the web, pull page content, and build research workflows with one API key.

environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Tavily services (dashboard or docs.tavily.com).

servers.name: pypi/mcp-server-time
servers.title: Time
servers.description: Current time and timezone conversion (IANA), with automatic system timezone detection

toolsSummary.name: get_current_time
toolsSummary.description: Return the current time for a given IANA timezone (or the configured default).

toolsSummary.name: convert_time
toolsSummary.description: Convert a time from one IANA timezone to another.

io.sami/gallery.about: Official MCP time utilities: get “now” and convert between IANA timezones, so agents can reason about deadlines and user-local times without hand-rolled date math.

servers.name: npm/wikipedia-mcp
servers.title: Wikipedia
servers.description: Search and read Wikipedia articles as Markdown for factual, cited lookups.

toolsSummary.name: search
toolsSummary.description: Search the English Wikipedia API and return titles, snippets, and article links.

toolsSummary.name: readArticle
toolsSummary.description: Load a full article as Markdown by title or page ID.

io.sami/gallery.about: Fetches and summarizes Wikipedia: search topics and read articles as Markdown to ground answers in a widely used, citable source—without API keys for public wikis.
